text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One key task is text understanding, where machines analyse written words to grasp their meaning. Another important use is translation, allowing tools like Google Translate to convert text between languages. Sentiment analysis also relies on NLP; it examines social media posts or reviews to determine if people feel positive, negative, or neutral. Finally, chatbots use NLP to chat with users, answering questions or providing help. These technologies make communication with machines smoother and more natural.
